words.meaning_en: To move from one region or country to another

words.meaning_en: Important or well-known; noticeable

words.meaning_en: To prevent from being expressed or known

words.hindi: सहानुभूति / दूसरों की पीड़ा महसूस करना
words.meaning_en: Feelings of pity and sorrow for someone else's misfortune

words.hindi: महामारी / एक क्षेत्र में फैलने वाला रोग
